response.justification: The candidate significantly exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of full-stack experience, deep TypeScript/Node.js and React work at multiple product companies, and current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure development (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks) — a rare and explicitly required skill. Strong testing culture (TDD, test-library author, testing workshops), cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker), and database breadth (MongoDB, MySQL, SQL) map directly to the stack. Gaps are mostly at the framework level (no explicit Nest.js, Vitest/Jest, or Kotlin) rather than fundamentals, which he should bridge quickly.
strengths: Current AI-agent development experience (MCP tooling, agentic workflow frameworks) matching a hard requirement
Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React product experience plus AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and MongoDB/MySQL
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks, teaches testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience; backend framework specifics unverified
Kotlin and Python absent from skills list (Java present but dated)
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not named directly, though testing depth suggests fast ramp-up

key_factors.factor: TypeScript/Node.js/React depth with cloud and testing expertise
